prompt: Professional brand guidelines board, landscape layout 1920x1080px. Clean white background (#FFFFFF). This is a minimalist, Apple-style brand identity sheet for a tech health platform called IMMUCONSULT. DESIGN LAYOUT — TOP SECTION (top 15% of canvas): Centered large bold navy blue text (#1B3A6B) reading 'IMMUCONSULT' in uppercase, clean sans-serif font (Inter or Helvetica Neue). Below it in smaller gray text (#9CA3AF): 'Brand Guidelines'. A thin horizontal line separator (#E5E5E5) below. MIDDLE LEFT SECTION (left 40%, from 20% to 75% height): Section title 'LOGO' in small uppercase navy text (#1B3A6B). Below: three logo variations arranged vertically with spacing — (1) A hexagonal badge icon containing a stylized dark navy blue human figure with arms raised and a large green leaf (#2E8B57) growing from the figure, inside a hexagon outline in navy blue (#1B3A6B), with text 'IMMUCONSULT' to the right in bold navy sans-serif — this is the horizontal lockup. (2) Same hexagonal icon but with 'IMMUCONSULT' text centered below — vertical lockup. (3) Just the hexagonal icon alone — icon only version. Each variation labeled underneath in tiny gray text: 'Horizontal', 'Vertical', 'Icon Only'. MIDDLE RIGHT SECTION (right 55%, from 20% to 50% height): Section title 'COLOR PALETTE' in small uppercase navy text. Six color swatches arranged in a horizontal row — each swatch is a rounded rectangle (approximately 80x80px appearance). Swatch 1: filled solid (#1B3A6B) dark navy, labeled 'Navy #1B3A6B'. Swatch 2: filled solid (#2E8B57) green, labeled 'Green #2E8B57'. Swatch 3: filled solid (#0071E3) bright blue, labeled 'Blue #0071E3'. Swatch 4: filled solid (#1D1F1F) near-black, labeled 'Dark #1D1F1F'. Swatch 5: filled solid (#F0F0F0) light gray, labeled 'Gray #F0F0F0'. Swatch 6: filled solid (#FFFFFF) white with thin border, labeled 'White #FFFFFF'. Hex codes in small monospace text below each swatch. BOTTOM RIGHT SECTION (right 55%, from 55% to 80% height): Section title 'TYPOGRAPHY' in small uppercase navy text. Font name 'Inter' in medium navy text. Three lines demonstrating weights — Line 1: 'Aa Bb Cc 123' in Semibold 600 weight, large size, navy color. Line 2: 'Aa Bb Cc 123' in Medium 500 weight, medium size, dark gray. Line 3: 'Aa Bb Cc 123' in Regular 400 weight, smaller size, light gray (#9CA3AF). Each line labeled with the weight name. BOTTOM STRIP (bottom 10%): Very subtle footer with tiny text 'Immuno Consult — Plataforma para Consultores Immunotec' centered in gray (#9CA3AF). OVERALL STYLE: Ultra clean, generous white space, professional graphic design. Flat design, no shadows, no gradients, no 3D effects. The entire image must look like a premium brand identity document created by a professional design agency. Sharp vector-like rendering. No photography, no stock images, no textures.
negative_prompt: gradients, textures, noise, photography, human models, 3D renders, stock photos, shadows, blurry text, watermarks, cluttered layout, complex backgrounds, decorative flourishes, hand-drawn elements, sketch style, cartoon, illustration style, soft focus, lens effects, bokeh, vignetting

settings.style: professional graphic design, brand identity, minimalist
